title: Rich Peppery Russian Lardons Stew
description: A hearty one-pot Russian stew featuring peppery flavors, aerated texture, and grana-padano cheese, made with gluten-free friendly ingredients and lardons-render for added richness.

ingredients.name: lardons
ingredients.notes: smoked bacon cut into small pieces

instructions: Heat a large Dutch oven over medium heat and add the lardons, cooking until crispy and golden brown.
Remove the lardons from the pot with a slotted spoon and set aside, leaving the rendered fat behind.
Add the chopped onions to the pot and cook until they are translucent and starting to caramelize.
Add the minced garlic to the pot and cook for an additional minute, stirring constantly to prevent burning.
Add the grated grana-padano cheese to the pot and stir until melted and well combined with the onion and garlic mixture.
Add the cubed potatoes and sliced carrots to the pot, stirring to combine with the cheese and onion mixture.
Add the chicken broth to the pot, bringing the mixture to a boil before reducing the heat to low and simmering for 20 minutes.
Stir in the cooked lardons, black pepper, and chopped parsley, and continue to simmer for an additional 10 minutes.
Serve the stew hot, topped with a dollop of sour cream if desired.
